Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.state

Class FilterObservable<E,C extends Collection<E>>

java.lang.Object
net.apartium.cocoabeans.state.FilterObservable<E,C>
Type Parameters:
E - The type of elements contained in the collection.
C - The type of collection being observed and filtered.
All Implemented Interfaces:
CollectionObservable<E,C>, Observable<C>, Observer
@AvailableSince("0.0.46") public class FilterObservable<E,C extends Collection<E>> extends Object implements CollectionObservable<E,C>, Observer
A class that observes a base collection and provides a filtered view of it based on a specified condition. The filtering is dynamic, updating the observed collection when the base collection or the filter's observables change.

  • Constructor Details

    • FilterObservable

      public FilterObservable(Observable<C> base, Function<E,Observable<Boolean>> filter, Function<Collection<E>,C> collectionMapper, Function<Integer,Collection<E>> constructCollection)
      Constructs a new FilterObservable, which applies a dynamic filtering mechanism on a base observable collection. The filtering, collection construction, and mapping of collections are handled by the provided functional interfaces.
      Parameters:
      base - The base observable collection to be filtered and observed.
      filter - A function that takes an element and returns an observable boolean, indicating whether the element should be included in the filtered collection.
      collectionMapper - A function that maps a collection of filtered elements to the desired target collection type.
      constructCollection - A function that constructs an empty collection of the desired type based on the provided size.

    • size

      public Observable<Integer> size()
      Description copied from interface: CollectionObservable
      Returns an observable representing the size of the observable. When the size of the current observable changes, the size observable will emit the new size.
      Specified by:
      size in interface CollectionObservable<E,C extends Collection<E>>
      Returns:
      size observable

    • filter

      public CollectionObservable<E,C> filter(Function<E,Observable<Boolean>> filter)
      Description copied from interface: CollectionObservable
      Filters the elements of this observable based on the provided filter function. Only elements for which the provided function evaluates to an observable that emits true will be included in the resulting observable.
      Specified by:
      filter in interface CollectionObservable<E,C extends Collection<E>>
      Parameters:
      filter - a function that takes an element of type E as input and returns an Observable of Boolean indicating whether the element should be included.
      Returns:
      a new CollectionObservable containing the filtered elements.
